phoneNumber.title: Phone Number
phoneNumber.description: The phone number used to login to InterQR (with country code, e.g., +1234567890)

token.title: Authentication Token
token.description: Auth token (automatically generated via the login UI)

deviceUuid.title: Device UUID
deviceUuid.description: Device UUID (automatically generated via the login UI)

updateInterval.title: Update Interval (minutes)
updateInterval.description: How often to poll the InterQR API for lock changes.
